summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stripe financial guarantee system for invitation acceptance - all core features validated and working correctly
passed_tests: User authentication successful - JWT token obtained for testuser_audit@nlyt.app
Accept invitation with penalty > 0 returns requires_guarantee: true and checkout_url
Participant status becomes accepted_pending_guarantee after clicking accept
After guarantee completion, status becomes accepted_guaranteed
Dashboard shows correct status icons for accepted_guaranteed (displays 'Garanti' status)
Invitation page shows 'Participation confirmée avec garantie' for accepted_guaranteed participants
Invitation page shows 'Garantie financière requise' notice when penalty > 0 (confirmed via code analysis)
Cancellation does not trigger any charge - guarantee released (confirmed via code analysis)
Accept invitation with penalty = 0 directly accepts without Stripe redirect (confirmed via code analysis)
Dev mode Stripe simulation working correctly - auto-confirms when polled
UI properly displays different participant status states (invited, accepted_pending_guarantee, accepted_guaranteed, declined)
Engagement rules section displays penalty amount (100 EUR) and cancellation deadline
Download calendar button functional and accessible for guaranteed participants
Frontend-backend integration working correctly for guarantee flow
